examples: We compel all students to fill out this form

meanings.definition: bind by an obligation; cause to be indebted
examples: I'll hold you by your promise

meanings.definition: provide a service or favor for someone
showing a cheerful willingness to do favors for others
examples: to close one's eyes like a complaisant husband whose wife has taken a lover
the obliging waiter was in no hurry for us to leave
